---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem to help us improve
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Call ...
3. See error ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Bug Type

Select one:

- [ ] Bicep / infrastructure bug
- [ ] Docker image / container runtime bug
- [ ] API code / behavior bug

## Version

- Version where bug was found (required):
- First known good version (optional):

## Context

If this is a Bicep bug, include:

- Bicep module or file path:
- Parameters file used:
- Deployment command used:

If this is a Docker or API bug, include:

- Docker image tag or digest:
- How the container was started (compose, docker run, other):
- Endpoint or feature affected:

## Logs Or Screenshots

Add relevant logs, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Additional Context

Any extra details that can help diagnose quickly.

## Upstream ClamAV Issues

If the issue is in the underlying ClamAV engine, signatures, or virus definitions (and not in this API, Docker image, or Bicep), please report it in the ClamAV repository:

https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav

## Be Kind

Please keep communication respectful and constructive. Focus feedback on behavior and technical details, not people.
